name: linux-perf-repair
permissions: run local build and benchmark commands
run perf when allowed by host policy
risks: agent proposes a fix from weak counter evidence
agent runs privileged perf commands blindly
mitigations: require regime classification and explicit unsupported conclusions
require before and after timing plus correctness checks
require permission explanation and fallback to static artifacts where needed
ethical_considerations: do not claim performance repairs without reproducible measurements
